attempts.failure: Engine core initialization failed with NotImplementedError: The page size of the layer is not divisible by the maximum page size. Cannot unify by adjusting block_size.
Engine core initialization failed with the same page-size unification NotImplementedError.

observations: The earlier multimodal profiling OOM path was successfully bypassed by patching the real wheel file under /opt/venv.
The model loads weight shards successfully and compiles the first graph range before the KV cache unification failure appears.
This lane is not yet a viable qwen27 runtime on the current 0.18.1 ROCm wheel without additional engine changes.
